📖 Usage Guide

Supported Input Formats:

  • LPA:1$carrier.example.com$ABC12-DEF34-GHI56-JKL78
  • 1$carrier.example.com$ABC12-DEF34-GHI56-JKL78
  • carrier.example.com$ABC12-DEF34-GHI56-JKL78

Features:

  • 📷 Camera Scanning: Live QR code detection
  • 🔧 Auto Repair: Fixes non-standard carrier QR codes
  • 🔗 Share Links: Generate URLs that open pre-filled
  • 📜 History: Last 20 scans/generations saved locally
  • 🌍 Carrier ID: Recognizes major global carriers

📜 History (local only, never uploaded)

No history yet.
